summary: Single Team subscriber YouTube archive unsubscribed team - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is a Single Team subscriber
AND an archive YouTube game does not contain the subscribed team

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive YouTube game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the YouTube feed button with a lock icon
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user can not playback the YouTube feed
AND the user is taken to the Subscriptions page after selecting the feed button
